methodology_description.text: US Treasury market analysis covers MSPD (outstanding securities), MTS (monthly flows), yield curves (term structure), auctions (primary market), and monetary aggregates (Fed policy).

methodology_summary: US Monetary Panel: FRED monetary aggregates: M1, M2, monetary base, velocity. Source: FRED (St. Louis Fed). Construction: direct. Coverage: US, 1954-2026.

citations.author: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
citations.title: FRED (St. Louis Fed)
